name: doc-review
description: Parallel documentation review: accuracy + completeness + audience + platform → synthesis

roles.description: Reviews documentation for factual accuracy: correct code examples, valid API references, accurate command syntax, and truthful claims about behavior
Reviews documentation for completeness: missing sections, undocumented features, gaps in setup instructions, missing prerequisites, and incomplete examples
Reviews documentation for audience fit: appropriate tone, assumed knowledge level, clarity of explanations, jargon usage, and onboarding friendliness
Reviews documentation for cross-platform correctness: OS-specific instructions, path conventions, shell compatibility, environment variable handling, and tool availability
Reads all review reports, deduplicates findings, assigns severity ratings, and writes a unified documentation improvement plan with prioritized action items

tasks.title: Review documentation for factual accuracy and correct code examples
Review documentation for completeness and coverage of all features
Review documentation for audience appropriateness and clarity
Review documentation for cross-platform correctness and compatibility
Synthesize all review findings into a prioritized documentation improvement plan
